category_sources: source_facts.description says BDD unit testing framework for POSIX shells; official shellspec.info describes ShellSpec as a BDD/unit testing framework.
display_name_sources: Official shellspec.info page title and heading use ShellSpec.
docs_sources: Official shellspec.info site provides overview, get-started material, examples, and feature documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/shellspec/shellspec, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and shellspec.info both identify BDD shell testing across dash, bash, ksh, zsh, and POSIX shells.
